operations.rationale: Carried forward from 0.10.2 so unpinned upgrades (which load only the latest manifest) still receive the Gemini->Antigravity cleanup. Remove the retired Antigravity desktop enablement table before reusing agents.antigravity for the agy-backed client. Idempotent: a no-op once the table is already migrated.

Carried forward from 0.10.2 for unpinned upgrades. Migrate the deprecated Gemini CLI enablement flag to the replacement agy-backed Antigravity client. Idempotent: a no-op when agents.gemini.enabled is already gone.

Carried forward from 0.10.2 for unpinned upgrades. Remove the leftover deprecated Gemini CLI table, including unsupported model and reasoning_effort keys. Idempotent: a no-op when the table is already gone.
Carried forward from 0.10.2 for unpinned upgrades. Ensure required agents.antigravity.enabled exists when no Gemini CLI setting was present. Idempotent: a no-op when the key already exists.
Carried forward from 0.10.2 for unpinned upgrades. Replace the deprecated Gemini CLI client ID in MCP server client lists with Antigravity. Idempotent: a no-op when no gemini client remains.
Carried forward from 0.10.2 for unpinned upgrades. Remove the GEMINI.md instruction shim now that the Gemini CLI is retired; agy reads AGENTS.md. Idempotent: a no-op when the file is already gone.

Agent Layer now ships a Claude Code status line (model, reasoning effort, context %, weekly usage limit, directory, git branch/dirty state, lines changed, session cost). Defaults to disabled, so a non-interactive upgrade keeps it off. Choose true to enable it; that seeds a missing editable .agent-layer/claude-statusline.sh source, sync copies it to .claude/claude-statusline.sh, and sync wires statusLine into .claude/settings.json. Choose false (the default) to keep it disabled; you can change agents.claude.statusline in .agent-layer/config.toml at any time.

Agent Layer now ships a Codex native status line fragment. Defaults to disabled, so a non-interactive upgrade keeps it off. Choose true to enable it; that seeds a missing editable .agent-layer/codex-statusline.toml source and sync merges its [tui].status_line list into .codex/config.toml unless agents.codex.agent_specific.tui.status_line is explicitly set. Choose false (the default) to keep it disabled; you can change agents.codex.statusline in .agent-layer/config.toml at any time.
